str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed immediately upon forming suspicion. VASPs registered under the AML Act (Ustawa o przeciwdziałaniu praniu pieniędzy oraz finansowaniu terroryzmu) are obliged institutions. Filed via GIIF's electronic system.

ctr.notes: Registered transactions: transactions of EUR 15,000 or more (or equivalent) must be reported. Filed via GIIF within 14 days of end of quarter.
